title: Fix Footer logo to use new uploaded logo image

requirements.summary: Replace the current N.B. Farm logo image in Footer.tsx bottom-left brand area with the newly uploaded logo at '/assets/generated/nb-farm-logo.png', displaying it at an appropriate size (48–64px height) consistent with the navigation bar logo while preserving all other footer content and styling
acceptanceCriteria: The Footer displays the new logo image from '/assets/generated/nb-farm-logo.png' in the bottom-left brand area above the quick navigation links.
The old/placeholder logo image is no longer shown in the footer.
The logo renders at an appropriate size (approximately 48–64px height) without distortion.
All other footer content (tagline, address, phone numbers, email, quick links, copyright) remains unchanged.
The footer layout and earthy theme styling remain consistent.

file_operations.description: Replace the existing logo image source in the bottom-left brand area (above the quick navigation links section) with the new logo at '/assets/generated/nb-farm-logo.dim_400x400.png'. Update the img element's src attribute to reference this workspace file path. Set the logo height to approximately 48–64px (consistent with Navigation.tsx) and ensure the aspect ratio is preserved. Keep all other footer content (N.B. Farm brand name, tagline, social links, quick navigation links, copyright) and styling unchanged.
